{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Monarch artifacts
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] can stretch [[Monarch artifacts]] to help others.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
